  MFH: r490910 r491042 r491043 r491119

  www/firefox: update to 65.0

  Backport a fix for WebRender on Wayland e.g.,

  $ GDK_BACKEND=wayland MOZ_WEBRENDER=1 MOZ_ACCELERATED=1 firefox https://example.com/
